name: Meyer Lemon Curd
recipeInstructions:
1. GRATE THE LEMON CAREFULLY, avoiding the white area under the skin, which has a bitter flavor.
2. Beat the egg yolks well and pour them through a strainer into a small non-corrosive saucepan.
3. Add the lemon peel, lemon juice, and sugar to the saucepan.
4. Cook over medium-low heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture thickens. Ensure not to let it boil or the yolks will curdle.
5. Once thickened, set the lemon curd in the refrigerator to cool.
6. When cooled, use immediately or cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate. Makes 1 Pie
